comment: Absolutely fantastic course! Priya ma'am explains everything so clearly. Got placed at a startup within 2 weeks of completing the bootcamp. Best investment I've made.
I came in knowing zero coding. 4 months later I built and deployed my own SaaS app. Siddharth sir is a legend. The community is super supportive.
Great content and very practical assignments. Would have loved more SQL depth. Overall really worth it — landed a data analyst role at a Big 4.
The LLM and prompt engineering module alone was worth the full fee. I've already started freelancing with it. EduFlow is genuinely different from other institutes.
Passed my AWS SAA-C03 exam on the first attempt! Deepak sir's lab sessions are gold. The Terraform section could be a little more detailed but overall excellent.
Kavya ma'am's React sessions are the best I've found anywhere — including YouTube. The project we built for the capstone is now my portfolio piece. Highly recommend.
Really practical — we did actual CTF challenges and simulated attacks. The night batch timing works perfectly for working professionals. Good value for ₹8,999.
Switched careers from a BPO job to an ML Engineer role in 5 months. EduFlow gave me the skills AND the confidence. The doubt sessions are what made the difference.
The Power BI dashboard project we built is now live at my company. Vikram sir has a great way of connecting data concepts to real business problems. Amazing course.
As a homemaker returning to tech, I was nervous. The supportive community and patient instructors made this a life-changing experience. I'm now a junior dev at a startup!
